title: Syria president denies wanting to intervene in Lebanon after Trump remarks

snapshot.title: Syria president denies wanting to intervene in Lebanon after Trump remarks
snapshot.description: DAMASCUS: Syrian President Ahmed Al-Sharaa denied on Sunday that his country sought to intervene militarily in Lebanon where Israel and Hezbollah are at war, after US President Donald Trump repeatedly suggested Damascus could get involved. “We are looking for economic channels between Lebanon and Syria, not military ones,” Sharaa said in an interview broadcast on television
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Syria president denies wanting to intervene in Lebanon after Trump remarks | Arab News
